1051.reason: [The parser assumes MainFuncDef always exists at the end, but doesn't verify if the current token actually matches MainFuncDef's starting token ('int'). This will cause errors when the input doesn't contain a main function or when parsing fails earlier.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The parser assumes MainFuncDef always exists at the end, but doesn't verify if the current token actually matches MainFuncDef's starting token ('int'). This will cause errors when the input doesn't contain a main function or when parsing fails earlier.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [This assumes MainFuncDef always exists at the end, but doesn't verify it's actually present in the input, which violates the grammar requirement that MainFuncDef must appear exactly once.]

983.reason: [Using PreToken(1) here is incorrect because it looks ahead without consuming tokens, but the logic assumes we've already seen 'int' and need to check if next is 'main'. The proper approach is to directly check current token sequence without complex lookahead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Using PreToken(1) here is incorrect because it looks ahead without consuming tokens, but the logic assumes we've already seen 'int' and need to check if next is 'main'. 992.reason: [PreToken(2) is similarly flawed - this manual lookahead doesn't properly handle the grammar structure and can cause misclassification between VarDecl, FuncDef, and MainFuncDef.]
